nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 鸡形目
nodes.summary: 鸡形目（Galliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联298种鸟类，如眼斑冢雉、Red-billed brushturkey、Black-billed brushturkey等298种鸟类。

nodes.name: Bearded guan
nodes.summary: The bearded guan (Penelope barbata) is a species of bird in the family Cracidae, the chachalacas, guans, and curassows. It is found in Ecuador and Peru. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forest. It is threatened by habitat loss. Appearance The bearded guan (Penelope barbata) is a small mostly brown bird that is about 55 cm large, and named for it red dewlap (or beard) While most of the bird is brown, it has dark grayish-brown upper parts and rear underparts as well as a silver crown and neck feathers. The bird also has white feathers edging its neck and breast, red legs, and a rufous tail. Habitat The bearded guan (Penelope barbata) lives at an altitude of 1200–3000 m in a humid environment located in northwest Peru and southern Ecuador. Threats The greatest threat to the bearded guan (Penelope barbata) is deforestation for agriculture and mining. Diet No information is known about the dietary habits of the bearded guan (Penelope barbata), however guans in general eat various fruits and berries and well as leaves, flowers and insects. Reproduction Bearded guan (Penelope barbata) are a monogamous, territorial species that mate at the beginning of the rain season (March–July). Most species of Guan reach sexual maturity at two years and can reproduce until they reach the age of twenty. A pair of guan will produce a clutch of three eggs which the female will incubate for 24–28 days. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet. Guans at FAO.org Bearded Guan at Neotropical Birds (Cornell University) Bearded Guan videos and photos on the Internet Bird Collection Photo & specifics-High Res; Article oiseaux

nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 冠雉属
nodes.summary: 冠雉属（Penelope）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联16种鸟类，如Band-tailed guan、Bearded guan、Baudo guan等16种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: 厄瓜多尔
nodes.summary: 厄瓜多尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联857种鸟类，包括安第斯斑䳍、红头林䳍、灰䳍等857种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 凤冠雉科
nodes.summary: 凤冠雉科（Cracidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联56种鸟类，如山冠雉、Black guan、Sickle-winged guan等56种鸟类。
